message:
refactor(scheduler): match→map_or_else, global_injector accessor, lock scoping

- Expose ThreeLaneScheduler::global_injector() for cross-module access
- Convert match on remove_stored_future to map_or_else (clippy preference)
- Replace explicit drop(local) with block scoping for local scheduler lock
- Duplicate ThreeLaneLocalCancelWaker impl block (likely concurrent agent
  mid-edit; will need dedup in next pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
